basic_details.organization_name: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre, Visakhapatnam
basic_details.short_information: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre, Visakhapatnam (HBCHRC Visakhapatnam) has published the Cardiologist Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 Cardiologist positions. Candidates within the age range as specified in the official notification and holding a D.M (Cardiology) or equivalent degree recognized by MCI are eligible to attend the walk-in interview at the hospital. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 28 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and official website link below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: D.M (Cardiology) or Equivalent Degree recognized by MCI
qualification.details: Cardiologist: D.M (Cardiology) or Equivalent Degree recognized by MCI with Minimum 1 year experience post qualification is desirable.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Cardiologist post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Cardiologist post at HBCHRC Visakhapatnam is scheduled for 28 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend within the specified time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the essential qualifications required for the Cardiologist position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a D.M (Cardiology) or an Equivalent Degree recognized by MCI. A minimum of 1 year of post-qualification experience is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Cardiologist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Cardiologist post at Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre, Visakhapatnam.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Interested and eligible candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Cardiologist position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Cardiologist position is Rs.500/- per consultation. This is a temporary position.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to take place?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will take place at the HRD Department, first floor, Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, 530053.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring their updated resume, recent passport size photograph, photocopies of Pan Card and Aadhar card, original certificates, and one set of self-attested copies of all certificates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit mentioned for the Cardiologist post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention an age limit. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any specific age criteria or relaxations.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Cardiologist position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Cardiologist position is Temporary.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Cardiologist recruitment at HBCHRC Visakhapatnam is TMC/HBCHRCV/AD/33/26.
